ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the date of the game */,
  "game_number" TEXT /* Game number in the series or season */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the game belongs to */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport being played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game was played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee assigned to the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the date is a holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the team plays */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary colors of the team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the league covers */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_logo" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players per team */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "popular_regions" TEXT /* Regions where the sport is popular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_stats_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's statistics record */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_player_stats_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_stats_id") REFERENCES player_stats ("player_stats_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves */,
  "winning_perfect_games" INTEGER /* Number of perfect games won */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "earned_run_average" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stats_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "inning" TEXT /* Inning of the game */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team in the inning */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team in the inning */,
  "inning_events" TEXT /* Events that occurred in the inning (e.g., hits, runs, outs) */,
  "home_team_lineup" TEXT /* Lineup of the home team for the inning */,
  "away_team_lineup" TEXT /* Lineup of the away team for the inning */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire for the inning */,
  "inning_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, artificial turf) */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was built */,
  "renovated_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was last renovated */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the venue's official website */,
  "nearest_transport" TEXT /* Information about the nearest public transport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_venues" (
  "game_venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-venue link */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venues_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venues_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team manager, public user) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)
